name: html-doc-claims
title: Govern authoritative .html docs: html doc-claim adapter (+symbol-mention staleness)
description: Authoritative docs/*.html produce ZERO facts/claims (markdown adapter scans .md only), so path/link refs AND code-identifier mentions in HTML drift invisibly to codas check. Layer 1: an html adapter extracting path/link claims (parity with .md doc_claims -> stale_claim existence check). Layer 2: verify code-identifier mentions (dotted modules / policy names) in authoritative docs against symbol facts (the deferred 'code spans illustrative' gap). Principle: any source file must be tracked.
creator: oydodo
